text: The third edition of Tomorrow's Lawyers is the most definitive guide available on the likely future developments in the legal profession. This is a period of immense change for lawyers. Technology and tectonic shifts in the wider market are transforming the profession in fundamental and irreversible ways. This book will equip all those interested in the future of law - students, practitioners and managers - with the knowledge and guidance needed to build a successful career and business in the new world. Written by the leading expert on technology in the law, this updated book is still the must read for all those looking to reform and shape the justice system of the future, as well as for lawyers determined to thrive in the changing legal environment.
headline: Fully Human Written
